brand.name: HAHA
brand.description: Premium beans, vibrant vibes, and the perfect workspace. Join the laughter, one cup at a time.

hero.headline:
Serious Coffee,
Lighter Vibes.
hero.subheadline: Premium artisanal brews served with a side of joy. Your neighborhood workspace and social sanctuary.

experience.headline:
More than just a
caffeine fix.

features.title: High-Speed Workspace
features.description: Dedicated quiet zones with gigabit fiber and ergonomic seating for your deep work sessions.

features.title: Power Everywhere
features.description: Never hunt for a socket again. Every table is equipped with universal power outlets and USB-C ports.

features.title: Artisanal Sourcing
features.description: Ethically sourced beans from small-batch roasters, ensuring every sip supports sustainable farming.

finalCTA.headline: Ready for a laugh and a latte?
finalCTA.subheadline: Join our community today. Order ahead and skip the queue.

hero.label: Our Story
hero.headline:
Brewing laughter,
one bean at a time.
hero.description: Founded in 2023, HAHA-Coffee started with a simple observation: most "premium" coffee shops were a bit too serious. We wanted to create a space where world-class specialty coffee meets a lighthearted, vibrant atmosphere.

values.headline: Our Philosophy
values.subheadline: The pillars that keep us brewing.

items.title: Quality First
items.description: We never compromise on our beans. Every cup is a result of meticulous sourcing and roasting.

items.title: Community Driven
items.description: HAHA is a space for everyone. From students to CEOs, we build connections over caffeine.

items.title: Sustainable Future
items.description: Zero-waste packaging and direct-trade partnerships are at the heart of our operations.

team.headline: Join the Laughter
team.description: We're more than a café; we're a movement to make the world a little more caffeinated and a lot more joyful.

menu.headline: The HAHA Menu
menu.description: From ethically sourced beans to artisanal snacks, every item is crafted to make your day a little brighter.

items.name: Signature HAHA Latte
items.description: Our secret blend with a hint of caramel and sea salt.

items.name: Avocado Sourdough Toast
items.description: Fresh avocado, chili flakes, and a poached egg on artisanal sourdough.

items.name: Cold Brew Nitro
items.description: Smooth, creamy, and naturally sweet nitro-infused cold brew.

items.name: Matcha Cheesecake
items.description: Ceremonial grade matcha cheesecake with a black sesame crust.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Melt
items.description: Wild mushrooms, truffle oil, and melted gruyère on ciabatta.

items.name: Espresso Tonic
items.description: Double shot espresso, premium tonic water, and a slice of grapefruit.

items.name: Classic Croissant
items.description: Buttery, flaky, and baked fresh every morning.

items.name: Acai Power Bowl
items.description: Organic acai topped with house-made granola and seasonal fruits.

gallery.headline: The HAHA Vibe
gallery.description: A glimpse into our daily brew and community.

contact.headline: Visit Us
contact.description: We're located in the heart of the creative district.

newsletter.headline: Stay Caffeinated
newsletter.description: Get exclusive offers and event invites.
